pageContext.name: Hawkeye (Battle of NY)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Hawkeye (Battle of NY)! Based on the likeness of Jeremy Renner from Marvel Studios: The Infinity Saga, this polystone Hawkeye statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   Marvel fans, don't miss your chance to add Hawkeye to your Marvel collection!
